# CWE-338 vulnerable: Use of Cryptographically Weak Pseudo-Random Number Generator (PRNG) (positive, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-338-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
	"time"
)

func MintAccessToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	rng := rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano()))
	token := strconv.FormatInt(rng.Int63(), 10)
	user := r.URL.Query().Get("user")
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE sessions SET token = ? WHERE user = ?", token, user)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
